fixture_ratings.name: Raya
fixture_ratings.notes: Confirmed NOT in Arsenal squad for GW38. Guaranteed zero. Sels auto-subs in as active GK. fdr from features.json = 3 (H).

fixture_ratings.name: Gabriel
fixture_ratings.notes: OUT for season — hamstring surgery confirmed. squad.json DOUBTFUL is outdated. Guaranteed zero. fdr from features.json = 3 (H).

fixture_ratings.name: Gvardiol
fixture_ratings.notes: Confirmed benched — City rotating with nothing at stake. Non-appearance risk very high despite best FDR in squad (fdr=2, H per features.json via Haaland same fixture).

fixture_ratings.name: Aina
fixture_ratings.notes: Forest vs Bournemouth at home. Dead rubber for both sides. Aina regular starter, likely plays 90. Clean sheet possible in low-stakes match but intensity limited. fdr=2 H.

fixture_ratings.name: M.Salah
fixture_ratings.notes: Liverpool away, fdr=3 per features.json. Liverpool likely champions — team motivation low but Salah has personal Golden Boot incentives. Away fixture adds difficulty weighting. Vice-captain.

fixture_ratings.name: Mbeumo
fixture_ratings.notes: Brentford home, fdr=2 per features.json. Nailed starter, no rotation risk. One of the three cleanest fixtures in the squad alongside Gvardiol (unavail risk) and Rogers.

fixture_ratings.name: Rogers
fixture_ratings.notes: Aston Villa home, fdr=2 per features.json. European qualification may still be in play — added motivation. Rogers regular starter. Solid mid-price with upside.

fixture_ratings.name: Anderson
fixture_ratings.notes: Forest home vs Bournemouth, fdr=2. Same dead rubber context as Aina and Wood. Limited goal/assist ceiling but will likely start 90. Returns may be modest.

fixture_ratings.name: Bowen
fixture_ratings.notes: CAPTAIN. WHU vs Leeds — West Ham in a relegation decider. Maximum team motivation; Bowen plays full 90 with highest intensity of any GW38 fixture. Home advantage. High ceiling. fdr=2 H context.

fixture_ratings.name: Mateta
fixture_ratings.notes: Crystal Palace away, fdr=3 per features.json. Away fixture adds difficulty. Palace mid-table with little at stake. Worst confirmed fixture for an outfield starter in the squad.

fixture_ratings.name: Wood
fixture_ratings.notes: Forest home vs Bournemouth. Wood reliable starter, physical presence. Dead rubber context means open play likely — goal chances exist but not assured. fdr=2 H.

fixture_ratings.name: Sels
fixture_ratings.notes: Auto-subs in as active GK replacing Raya. Forest home vs Bournemouth, fdr=2. Converts guaranteed zero (Raya) into live clean sheet chance. xpts=1 in xpts.json confirms expected contribution.

fixture_ratings.name: Haaland
fixture_ratings.notes: UNAVAILABLE per squad.json. Guaranteed zero. MCI H fdr=2 (per features.json) is irrelevant — asset cannot be utilised.

fixture_ratings.name: Munoz
fixture_ratings.notes: Bench DEF. Crystal Palace away, fdr=3. Same fixture as Mateta. Away trip with no stakes. Clean sheet odds very low. Emergency cover only.

fixture_ratings.name: Kluivert
fixture_ratings.notes: Bench MID. Bournemouth away at Forest — dead rubber both sides. fdr=2 from Aina/Anderson/Wood reciprocal fixture. Kluivert may feature but returns unpredictable. Emergency cover only.

high_rotation_risk: Gvardiol (confirmed benched, MCI rotating entire squad)

captain_analysis.verdict: Defensible. WHU vs Leeds in a relegation decider is the highest-motivation fixture in GW38. Home advantage. Bowen is West Ham's main creative threat and plays the full 90 in a must-win context. High ceiling, medium floor.
captain_analysis.vc_verdict: Reasonable fallback. Salah has personal Golden Boot incentives even with team rotation risk. Away fixture is the main concern. Guarantees minutes if Bowen blanks.

data_quality_note: features.json is a SAMPLE file with confirmed GW38 fdr/loc data for 6 players: Haaland (MCI H fdr=2), M.Salah (LIV A fdr=3), Mbeumo (BRE H fdr=2), Gabriel (ARS H fdr=3), Mateta (CRY A fdr=3), Rogers (AVL H fdr=2). All others use contextual intel (NFO vs BOU confirmed, WHU vs Leeds confirmed) or flat fdr=3 from xpts.json.
summary: GW38 final gameweek — no DGW, no BGW, all 20 teams play once. Best confirmed fixtures (fdr=2, H): Mbeumo (BRE), Rogers (AVL), and NFO trio (Aina/Anderson/Wood vs BOU). Bowen (WHU vs Leeds, captain) has maximum motivation via relegation decider. Worst confirmed: Mateta and Munoz (CRY A fdr=3), M.Salah (LIV A fdr=3). Three guaranteed zeros: Raya (not in squad), Gabriel (season-ending injury), Haaland (unavailable). Gvardiol is benched rotation risk despite MCI H fdr=2.
